entries.a: A real-world system for building decentralized, human-AI coordination networks.
Your operational intelligence layer. A structured, canon-bound co-pilot.

entries.q: Why does Echelon use cinematic language?
entries.a: Because learning is emotional. Cinematics engage the deeper parts of your cognition.
No. All learning state is stored locally on your device.

entries.q: How does the system adapt to me?
entries.a: Through your archetype, loop type, decisions, missions, and upload performance.
